summary: TWO_COLUMN algebraic derivation of the Sierpinski dimension. LEFT: YELLOW Sierpinski (order 5) with caption 'scale by 1/2 → mass becomes 1/3'. RIGHT: four-step TransformFromCopy / ReplacementTransform chain (1/2)^D · M = (1/3) M  →  (1/2)^D = 1/3  →  2^D = 3  →  D = log_2(3) ≈ 1.585, boxed in YELLOW SurroundingRectangle.
